title: rubus suberectus var. fastigiatus
intro: Rubus suberectus var. fastigiatus, also known as the erect blackberry, is a variety of flowering shrub native to China, characterized by its erect and fastigiate growth habit. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus suberectus var. fastigiatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
